executives.name: Dale Verran
executives.background: Mr. Verran is a Professional Geoscientist with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously Vice President, Exploration for Denison Mines Corp. and has held senior roles with various exploration and mining companies.

executives.name: Daniel Whittaker
executives.background: Mr. Whittaker has over 30 years of experience in the resource sector, including senior management roles in exploration and development companies.

executives.name: Wade Dawe
executives.background: Mr. Dawe is an experienced entrepreneur and financier based in Halifax, Nova Scotia. He has founded and served as an executive and director of several successful companies in the mining and technology sectors.
